title: `is_readable` returns false
author: azamat-sharapov
body:
Trying basic code from example, but `is_readable()` returns false, while `file_get_contents()` returns contents without problems. I assume this is because it's stream and looks like `is_readable()` returns false for streams. 

Any idea/workaround for this?

title: Add changelog
author: adlawson
body: Changes at this stage are sometimes quite large. Good thing is that not many people use this library so I can get away with it for now but I should really add a useful changelog.

title: PHP function is_dir() does not work with vfs.php
author: stubbetje

title: Can VFS be used as sandbox FS for a shell like app?
author: jcubic
body: Is it possible to use this as file system for JSON-RPC where client is command line app in a browser? Or this FS vanish when the script end. Is it possilbe to save reference to VFS in a $_SESSION?

title: Gif
author: rememberlenny
body: Where is that awesome gif from?

title: Add tests (passing or otherwise) to cover virtual SQLite DBs
author: adlawson
body: There's some uncertainty as to whether PHPs PDO or SQLite, etc drivers support streams other than the default `sqlite:/`

title: Handle open mode (and modifier) not always considered
author: adlawson
body: Some of the time, especially when opening a file/directory handle, the open mode is taken into account (`w` vs `w+` vs `xt` etc). The mode and modifier both need to be taken into account when reading/writing/deleting handles.

title: File permissions / ACL
author: adlawson
body: Files (and directories) are all currently created with `0777` type permissions (see [src/Stream/FileHandle.php#L30](https://github.com/adlawson/vfs.php/blob/master/src/Stream/FileHandle.php#L30)).

title: File locking
author: adlawson
body: It's not currently possible to create file locks with `flock` (or by any other means for that matter). This needs to be sorted.

title: Implement symlinks
author: adlawson
body: Some of the work is already in place to support symlinks (`LinkInterface` for example) but the concrete implementation isn't yet defined.
